headers.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://images.unsplash.com; media-src 'self' blob:; connect-src 'self' https: ws: wss:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self'; frame-ancestors 'self'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'
